skills.name: Create SQLite Database
skills.desc: Create a new SQLite database file.

skills.name: Connect To Database
skills.desc: Establish a connection to a SQLite database.

skills.name: Create New Table
skills.desc: Build a new table in a SQLite database.

skills.name: Set Primary Key
skills.desc: Define a primary key in a SQLite table.

skills.name: Insert Single Row
skills.desc: Insert one row of data into a SQLite table.

skills.name: Insert Multiple Rows
skills.desc: Insert multiple rows into a SQLite table.

skills.name: Select All Rows
skills.desc: Retrieve all rows from a SQLite table.

skills.name: Filter With WHERE
skills.desc: Filter SQLite query results using a WHERE clause.

skills.name: Sort With ORDER BY
skills.desc: Sort SQLite query results with ORDER BY.

skills.name: Update Single Row
skills.desc: Update one row in a SQLite table.

skills.name: Delete Single Row
skills.desc: Delete one row from a SQLite table.

skills.name: Add New Column
skills.desc: Add a new column to an existing SQLite table.

skills.name: Create Single Index
skills.desc: Create an index on a SQLite table column.

skills.name: Drop Single Index
skills.desc: Drop an index from a SQLite table.

skills.name: Create Simple View
skills.desc: Create a simple view in a SQLite database.

skills.name: Drop Simple View
skills.desc: Drop a view from a SQLite database.

skills.name: Begin New Transaction
skills.desc: Start a new transaction in SQLite.

skills.name: Commit Transaction
skills.desc: Commit changes in a SQLite transaction.

skills.name: Rollback Transaction
skills.desc: Roll back changes in a SQLite transaction.

skills.name: Check Table Existence
skills.desc: Verify if a table exists in a SQLite database.

skills.name: Get SQLite Version
skills.desc: Retrieve the version of the SQLite engine.

skills.name: Close Database Connection
skills.desc: Close the connection to a SQLite database.
